title: Proposals for Heathrow expansion: information for potential promoters
body: "This letter to potential promoters of Heathrow expansion follows on from the Chancellor’s invitation for proposals for a third runway to be brought forward by this summer.  The letter outlines essential information that is required in plans brought forward as proposals may be used to inform the Airports National Policy Statement review.  The criteria cover:   airport scheme design expected timelines costs and revenues ownership, financing and funding deliverability environmental implications and planned mitigation   Next steps  See Heathrow expansion: next steps for promoters, the Secretary of State for Transport’s follow up to this letter, 22 October 2025. "
